description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:latest Docker image. Add a global before_script that creates /go/src/gitlab.com/jckimble and /go/src/_/builds directories, copies the project directory into /go/src/gitlab.com/jckimble/smsprovider, creates a symlink from /go/src/gitlab.com/smsprovider to /go/src/_/builds/jckimble, and changes directory to /go/src/gitlab.com/jckimble/smsprovider. Define a single stage named test and a coverage job in that stage that runs the command `go test -v -coverprofile cover`. No caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules are defined.
